creator: ghw@7axu.com
text:
gstreamer-plugins-ogg is not a necessary dependency so I just removed it.

2012/10/25 Raphael Kubo da Costa <rakuco@freebsd.org>:
> Out of curiosity, does
>
>   -USE_GSTREAMER=       good mp3 ogg
>   +USE_GSTREAMER=    good mp3
>
> mean that the ogg support has been dropped upstream or something like
> that?
